meaning: n.(尤指乡村或公路边的) 旅馆,客栈vi.住旅馆
examples: I always feel at home at Ye Olde Starre Inn.
I learnt that the house had formerly been an inn.
She washed her face at the pump in front of the inn.
The Ship Inn is the place if you want a pint with the locals.
Nicola McDonough and Margaret McDonough, 52, were discovered at the Premier Inn, Greenock, on Friday.
